note_text: Wound note - Leftfoot. Meas 4.9x2.2x1.2cm. Heavy serosang drainage, odor present. Wound bed 75% gran, 25% slough. Periwound erythematous. Foam dsg changed. Pt tolerated well. Dr. Okafor notified.

Wound note - Leftfoot. Meas 4.9x2.2x1.2cm. Heavy serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 54% gran, 46% slough. Periwound erythematous. NPWT canister changed. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Thornton notified.
